channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Wildfire Alert: Pemberton Residents Brace for Increased Fire Activity Amid Dry Lightning Threats
item.description: Residents of Pemberton, British Columbia, are experiencing heightened anxiety as wildfires rage across the region, with many forced to monitor firefighting efforts from their own backyards. The situat...

item.title: British yacht couple reflect on close encounter with Russian warship
item.description: Jane and Alan Kelvey, a retired British couple on a two-month sailing trip, found themselves in an international incident when their 12-metre yacht, Bright Future, encountered a Russian frigate, Admir...

item.title: Darebin Council Area Liquidations List Published for July 16
item.description: The article provides a list of businesses undergoing liquidation within the Darebin Council Area as of July 16. However, the text also includes a technical message from News Corp Australia regarding c...

item.title: Trump Promotes MAGA as Solution to Political Divisions
item.description: The article discusses former President Donald Trump's continued advocacy for the 'Make America Great Again' (MAGA) movement, framing it as a necessary force to address perceived political and social c...

item.title: PM Modi meets Qatar's Amir during visit, discusses legacy of late Emir
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi recently held a high-level meeting with Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani, the Amir of Qatar, during his official visit to the Gulf nation. The discussion centered around th...

item.title: University of Dar es Salaam Achieves Third Place in East Africa for Graduate Employability
item.description: The University of Dar es Salaam (UDSM) has emerged as the third best university in East Africa for graduate employability according to the latest QS World University Rankings. UDSM scored 85.3 in the ...

item.title: New PF Scheme for Self-Employed Workers and Unorganized Sector
item.description: The government has announced a new Provident Fund (PF) scheme aimed at providing financial security to self-employed individuals and workers in the unorganized sector. This initiative seeks to formali...

item.title: CSA Awards: Aiden Markram and Laura Wolvaardt Recognized as Top Performers
item.description: At the 2026 Cricket South Africa (CSA) Awards, Proteas Men’s T20I captain Aiden Markram and Women’s skipper Laura Wolvaardt were crowned King and Queen of the ball, respectively. Wolvaardt, 27, secure...

item.title: The US Approves a Space Mirror to Light Night, Sparking Environmental Concerns
item.description: A California startup, Reflect Orbital, has received FCC approval to test a satellite equipped with an 18-meter-wide mirror that could reflect sunlight onto Earth's dark side. The demo satellite, Eären...

item.title: Ajit Doval Calls for Regional Cooperation to Combat Terrorism and Organized Crime in BIMSTEC
item.description: National Security Advisor Ajit Doval chaired the 5th meeting of BIMSTEC national security chiefs, emphasizing the need for regional cooperation to combat terrorism, organized crime, and multi-domain s...

item.title: Jackson Suber Shines in First British Open with Strong 65
item.description: Jackson Suber made a strong debut at the British Open, carding a five-under 65 to take the early lead at Royal Birkdale. The 26-year-old American, playing in his third major, showcased his skill with ...

item.title: Cape Town police face scrutiny over unsecured seized firearms in evidence storage
item.description: Cape Town police have come under scrutiny after firearms and ammunition seized during April 2026 were left unattended in SAPS 13 stores at various police stations instead of being sent to the Forensic...

item.title: Melissa Gilbert faces backlash after removal from hit series amid legal controversies
item.description: The article details the fallout surrounding actress Melissa Gilbert, who was removed from her long-running television series following a controversial incident. The narrative connects this to her husb...

item.title: Trump's Primetime Speech Sparks Outcry Over Election Claims Amid National Crises
item.description: The article criticizes President Donald Trump for using a primetime address to rehash the 2020 election controversy instead of addressing pressing national issues like the Iran war, rising gas prices,...

item.title: NBI Chief Matibag Prioritizes Impeachment Trial Over Thailand Summit
item.description: National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) chief Melvin Matibag has decided to skip the regional summit in Thailand originally planned for July 20, 2026, to focus on his impeachment trial. The NBI directo...

item.title: US n Iran Renewed Clash Over Hormuz Strait Amid Escalating Tensions
item.description: The US n Iran are back in a major clash over the vital Strait of Hormuz, with both sides exchanging strikes that have caused widespread damage. The conflict, which flared up again after a failed peace...

item.title: DNA revelations unravel family secrets and emotional truths
item.description: Vikki's life unraveled when she discovered her biological father wasn't the man she believed to be her dad. After her mother revealed the secret on the 10th anniversary of her father's death, Vikki fa...

item.title: Tsunami Warning Cancelled in New Zealand After South Island Earthquake
item.description: A tsunami warning for New Zealand has been officially lifted following a 5.9 magnitude earthquake near Te Anau in the South Island. The quake, which struck at 9:14pm local time, initially registered a...

item.title: Tanzania Football Federation Announces Promotion of Polisi Tanzania to Premier League and Relegation of Prisons FC
item.description: The Tanzania Football Federation has confirmed significant changes to the country's top-tier football landscape, with Polisi Tanzania securing promotion to the Premier League while Prisons FC faces re...

item.title: Mahlangu arrested in connection with EFF leader's murder
item.description: The Gauteng Political Killings Task Team has arrested Sipho Lucky Mahlangu, 34, in connection with the murder of Monica Dube, the Economic Freedom Fighters (EFF) Tshwane Region Two secretary and elect...
